rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Amata Anantaprayoon, Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: Rhadamanthys Infostealer User-Agent

rules.rule_text:
title: Rhadamanthys Infostealer User-Agent
id: 0af9c754-a334-44f3-aacc-2aeb42b3c9aa
description: Rhadamanthys infostealer uses a user-agent of curl/5.9 which was released
  in 1999
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Amata Anantaprayoon, Patrik Olson
date: '2023-01-13'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-useragent: curl/5.9
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Software that hasn't updated their curl library since 1999
level: critical
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
